deal_queries.name: Russia M&A
deal_queries.query: (слияние OR поглощение OR приобретение OR купила OR продала OR закрыла сделку) (компания OR группа OR холдинг)

deal_queries.name: Russia ECM / DCM
deal_queries.query: (IPO OR SPO OR размещение акций OR размещение облигаций OR выпуск облигаций) (компания OR эмитент)

deal_hypotheses.title: Yandex — inorganic travel expansion
deal_hypotheses.thesis: Проверить, формируется ли публично подтверждаемая логика консолидации travel-tech активов вокруг экосистемы Yandex.
deal_hypotheses.decision_question: Есть ли достаточно подтверждённых сигналов для pitch по buy-side / strategic options?
deal_hypotheses.deliverable: Target map + precedent transactions + one-page pitch angle

deal_hypotheses.title: Ozon — capital allocation and financing options
deal_hypotheses.thesis: Отслеживать, как financial performance и capital allocation меняют доступные equity/debt financing сценарии.
deal_hypotheses.decision_question: Какое окно финансирования и banker angle выглядят наиболее актуальными сейчас?
deal_hypotheses.deliverable: Funding options screen + trading comps + capital structure note

issuers.name: Ozon Investor Relations
issuers.disabled_reason: The site blocks unattended requests; Ozon remains covered by market-wide and company-news feeds.

regulators.name: ФАС России
regulators.disabled_reason: The regulator site is not reliably reachable from GitHub runners; re-enable after a stable official feed is available.

sec_edgar.disabled_reason: SEC returns 403 from the current unattended runner; historical SEC precedents remain in the curated database.

gdelt.disabled_reason: GDELT rate-limits the scheduled runner; direct publisher and issuer feeds remain enabled.

cis_source_registry.name: Московская биржа / MOEX ISS
cis_source_registry.access_method: Public ISS API and issuer pages
cis_source_registry.expected_value: Current Russian deal and capital-markets disclosures
cis_source_registry.limitations: Technical exchange notices remain suppressed by the existing classifier.

cis_source_registry.name: KASE and AIX official disclosures
cis_source_registry.access_method: Public pages; formal data access may require an agreement
cis_source_registry.limitations: Deferred until stable permitted unattended access and a narrow event taxonomy are confirmed.

cis_source_registry.name: UZSE material facts
cis_source_registry.access_method: Public server-rendered disclosure list and primary detail pages
cis_source_registry.expected_value: Registered securities issues with issuer, instrument and disclosed amount
cis_source_registry.limitations: Only fact 25 is collected; old records outside the archive window do not enter the dataset; every event links to UZSE.

cis_source_registry.name: Openinfo corporate disclosure portal
cis_source_registry.expected_value: Broader issuer material facts and securities issues
cis_source_registry.limitations: Roadmap source pending a stable public index or documented API and narrow fact filters.

cis_source_registry.name: Kyrgyz Stock Exchange disclosure center
cis_source_registry.limitations: Deferred because the site restricts copying without written permission.

cis_source_registry.name: Belarus exchange and depository disclosures
cis_source_registry.limitations: Roadmap only until an authoritative stable endpoint and reuse terms are verified.
